core_mechanism: A configuration-model random ensemble generalized to hypergraphs — random multi-way incidence structures built from prescribed degree distributions — whose large-size structural properties are computed exactly via probability generating functions
brief_reason: The abstract proposes representing a tripartite (three-way) structure as random hypergraphs and states that many properties of the model can be calculated exactly in the limit of large network size, which is the signature of generating-function analysis of a prescribed-degree random (hyper)graph ensemble.
